Basically India and Pakistan cannot get along because they
have their lagna in of 2 and 12.
One of my brilliant predictions was the restoring of India
pak ties. Very elementary. The bhukthis of Saturn was
about to begin. So I felt there will be no wars but
restoration of ties. Even though Mr. vajapee had send
troops to the border, I know there will be logger hods
but will never beat up each other due to the bhukthis.
2005 on indo pak wars-
